methodology: Each entry is an event-level record from one or more source connectors. Tier badges reflect corroboration: 'multi' (≥2 independent sources), 'single' (one source, surfaced anyway with tag), 'disputed' (sources disagree materially), 'adjudicated' (confirmed by court or regulator of record).
data_status: illustrative — pipeline not yet live; entries pattern-mirror what live ingestion would produce

tier_definitions.multi: Confirmed by two or more independent sources within 30 days.
tier_definitions.single: Reported by one source; not yet corroborated.
tier_definitions.disputed: Multiple sources but materially disagree on scale or significance.
tier_definitions.adjudicated: Confirmed by a regulator or court of record (FDA/EMA approval, IUCN status change, treaty deposit, peace accord signed).

events.summary: Recommendation issued for next-generation oral cholera vaccine; manufacturing scale-up commitments from three producers
Amazon deforestation rate for Apr 2026 reported 38% below same month 2023; second consecutive quarter of decline
Visceral leishmaniasis (kala-azar) elimination as public health problem confirmed across all endemic blocks
Approval for first oral CGRP-class migraine prophylactic at sub-$1/day generic pricing; cost reduction ~95% from launch
Grid reaches 95% renewable on weekly average; geothermal share over 50%
Iberian lynx reclassified from Endangered to Vulnerable; population estimate 2,021 individuals
Court strikes down remaining colonial-era criminal-defamation provisions; press freedom gain confirmed
Conditional approval for first allogeneic CAR-T therapy at hospital-administered pricing — production cost cut 80%
Lassa fever case fatality rate falls below 10% for first time on record; outbreak containment cited
First disbursement to Pacific Island states for cyclone-recovery housing program; $187M tranche
Lower-secondary completion rate reaches 99.2%; gender parity index unchanged at 1.01
Hepatitis C elimination target met five years early; treatment access expanded to all eligible patients
Native title recognized over 27,000 km² Pilbara region; co-management agreement signed
Maternal mortality ratio falls below 100 per 100,000 live births for first time
Zero wild poliovirus cases reported for 14th consecutive month outside two endemic districts in Pakistan
Marine protected area expanded by 78,000 km² off Juan Fernández; 30x30 commitment fully met
Reform to the Mudawana family code passed; expanded grounds for divorce and inheritance rights for women
Hokkaido offshore wind capacity hits 5 GW operational; FIT-to-FIP transition complete
Stunting prevalence in under-fives falls to 28%, lowest on record; nutrition program cited
Skilled-immigration backlog cleared; processing time for visa decisions back to statutory target
